title: 第六章 无声冠核
theme: 王冠内核、无声钟室、银线管道、最终礼仪宫
scale_intent: 不复刻商业地图，只采用大体量银河恶魔城的通用节奏：长主线、多支路、能力回访、捷径闭环、Boss 前短跑。
loop_note: 终章采用三层环形核结构，全部前章能力都能开回访门，最终 Boss 前形成短闭环。

metroidvania_design_rules.inspiration_boundary: Use original map layouts only; borrow genre principles such as vertical hubs, gated return paths, and shortcut compression.
chapter_arc: show locked routes before the key ability
open optional branches with visible rewards
keep boss runback short after the final save

cluster_macro_rules.entry_spine: early readable spine with a few visible branches
cluster_macro_rules.tall_shaft: vertical memory anchor that later abilities compress
cluster_macro_rules.loop_gallery: wide loop that returns to a known room
cluster_macro_rules.reward_cave: optional pocket cluster with risk/reward exits
cluster_macro_rules.wide_canal: horizontal travel band broken by vertical callbacks
cluster_macro_rules.boss_run: late gauntlet with short save-to-boss runback

legend.main_route: 红箭头：一周目主线推进
legend.branch: 蓝线：支线、奖励房、区域内连接
legend.shortcut: 绿虚箭：从背面开启的捷径
legend.ability_gate: 紫虚箭：能力门或回访门，线中标注需求能力
legend.npc: N：剧情 NPC、商人、地图师或提示者
legend.reward: R：护符、货币、生命碎片或剧情道具

rooms.name: 冠核外环1
rooms.design_goal: Teach the first landmark, safe footing, and the chapter visual language.
rooms.reward_contract: orientation, map silhouette, first safe return point

rooms.name: 冠核外环2
rooms.design_goal: Carry the upward pilgrimage through a readable critical path.
rooms.reward_contract: forward progress and landmark reveal

rooms.name: 冠核外环3
rooms.design_goal: Let the player see a goal or route before they can reach it.
rooms.reward_contract: foreshadowed destination

rooms.design_goal: Carry the upward pilgrimage through a readable critical path.
rooms.reward_contract: forward progress and landmark reveal

rooms.design_goal: Carry the upward pilgrimage through a readable critical path.
rooms.reward_contract: forward progress and landmark reveal

rooms.name: 冠核外环7
rooms.design_goal: Show a closed return path first, then let the far side open it.
rooms.reward_contract: shorter runback and stronger world memory

implementation_notes: 单张 PNG 是关卡设计用俯视拓扑图，不是最终游戏内小地图贴图。
房间矩形留有较大间距，便于在 Aseprite/Tiled/Godot 中拆成独立区域。
红线为一周目主线，蓝线为支线，绿线为已解锁捷径，紫线为能力门/回访门。
每章 Boss 前必须保留短路径存档点，避免玩家死亡后重复跑长线。
